message:
fix(codegen): Complete getBodyAndClear → getBodyDupe migration

Migrate all 154 unsafe getBodyAndClear() usages to safe getBodyDupe()
pattern to fix memory aliasing bugs that cause @memcpy panics.

The fix duplicates buffer memory before clearing, preventing aliasing
when the buffer is reused before the caller finishes using the slice.

Files migrated:
- High priority (8+ usages): json.zig, return_stmt.zig, for_special.zig,
  recursive.zig
- Medium priority (3-7 usages): raise.zig, core.zig, assign_defer.zig,
  _sre_mod.zig, zipimport_mod.zig, with.zig, imports.zig, class_fields.zig
- Low priority (1-3 usages): All remaining stdlib mods, statements, etc.

24 pre-existing safe usages remain (already wrapped with alloc.dupe()).
